title: JourneyEnvelopeV1
description: Versioned metadata embedded in structured chat turns and aligned across MCP / CLI / orchestrator surfaces.

envelope_version.description: Increment when breaking field semantics; keep in sync with vox-mcp journey_envelope builder.

journey_id.description: Stable id for this user request across routing, storage, and telemetry.

session_id.description: Chat / workflow session partition (may default to 'default' in MCP).

thread_id.description: Editor or branch thread id when distinct from session_id.

trace_id.description: End-to-end trace for retrieval / HTTP sidecars.

correlation_id.description: Fallback correlation when trace_id is unset.

repository_id.description: Vox repository id from workspace discovery.

origin_surface.description: Writer surface for joins with routing_decisions.surface

cognitive_profile.description: Optional MCP chat routing hint (fast | reasoning | creative).
